name: Milvus (uvx)
description: Connect to a Milvus vector database. Search and query vectors, manage collections, run full-text and hybrid search, and inspect schema across self-hosted Milvus or Zilliz Cloud.

inputs.label: Milvus URI
inputs.description: Connection URI for your Milvus server or Zilliz Cloud cluster. Use http://localhost:19530 for a local instance, or the public endpoint of your Zilliz Cloud cluster.

inputs.label: Milvus Token
inputs.description: Authentication token for Milvus. For Zilliz Cloud this is the cluster's API key or user:password token. Leave empty for a local Milvus instance without authentication.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in to Zilliz Cloud
2. Open your cluster
3. Go to the Connect / Cluster Details panel
4. Copy the Public Endpoint into Milvus URI
5. Copy the API Key (token) into Milvus Token

auth.instructions: Provide your Milvus URI. A token is optional for local Milvus without auth, and required for Zilliz Cloud (use the cluster API key).
